name: pyqtpurchasing-qt5

metadata.name: PyQtPurchasing-Qt5
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqtpurchasing-qt5==5.15.16

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQtPurchasing.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQtPurchasing.

This package is licensed under the terms of the LGPL v3.
